"'''Changing the Odds: The Adventures of Dannen Lifehold'''" was a short story written by [[Dave Marron]], originally published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3]] by [[West End Games]] in [[August]] [[1994]] and later archived online at [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

==Plot summary==
Though he does not want to get involved with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]], [[Dannen Lifehold]] delivers medical supplies from [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] to a Rebel outpost on [[Rafft]]. A [[Homing beacon/Legends|homing beacon]] hidden in the cargo alerts the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] to the Rebel presence. Dannen helps evacuate the Rebels and, upon learning that Alderaan has been destroyed, commits himself fully to the Rebel Alliance.
